column1: # 外交對白(DIPLOMSE.LBX,786 條)。英文原文即 key,\xNN 變數(\x80 對方稱你/皇帝名、
# \x81 你的種族、\x82 對方帝國、\x83 對方皇帝、\x84 冠詞 a/an)。中文保留資料標記、略冠詞。批次逐步補。
You are destined to fail, \x80. It is the law of evolution: the weak species will die, and only the strong will remain.
column2: 你注定失敗,\x80。這是演化的法則:弱者將滅亡,唯有強者長存。

column1: Your presence makes me ill, Emperor \x80. Nothing you say is of any consequence to the great \x82 Empire.
column2: 你的存在令我作嘔,\x80 皇帝。你所說的一切,對偉大的 \x82 帝國都毫無意義。

column1: Keep your worthless ships out of \x82 space, foolish \x80. We will not tolerate any trouble from you or your kind.
column2: 讓你那些無用的船艦滾出 \x82 領域,愚蠢的 \x80。我們不會容忍你或你的同類製造任何麻煩。

column1: The entire \x81 race will kneel before the mighty \x82 Empire, \x80. It is only a matter of time.
column2: 整個 \x81 種族都將臣服於強大的 \x82 帝國腳下,\x80。這只是時間問題。

column1: The only thing worse than \x84 \x81 citizen is \x84 \x81 Emperor. Your defeat will be swift but your death slow and painful.
column2: 比一個 \x81 公民更糟的,就只有一個 \x81 皇帝。你的敗亡將迅速,但你的死亡將緩慢而痛苦。

column1: The \x81 people are as weak as they are ugly.  We will destroy you all, \x80.
column2: \x81 人既軟弱又醜陋。我們會將你們全數消滅,\x80。

column1: Your people are only fit as slaves to the noble \x82 Empire. Your utter destruction is inevitable.
column2: 你的人民只配做高貴 \x82 帝國的奴隸。你的徹底毀滅無可避免。

column1: Death to the \x81 race! First, we'll destroy your ships. Then, we'll destroy your planets. We will not rest until you are gone!
column2: \x81 種族去死吧!我們會先摧毀你的船艦,再摧毀你的行星。不將你抹除,我們絕不罷休!

column1: Seeing you defeated will not be enough. It is your death, and the extinction of your entire race that I look forward to!
column2: 光是看你戰敗還不夠。我期盼的是你的死亡,以及你整個種族的滅絕!

column1: Your mere presence makes my skin crawl with revulsion, \x80. Be gone from \x82 space, or you will be destroyed.
column2: 光是你的存在就令我厭惡得渾身起雞皮疙瘩,\x80。滾出 \x82 領域,否則你將被摧毀。

column1: Your empire is pathetic, \x80. I will personally see to your utter destruction.
column2: 你的帝國可悲至極,\x80。我會親自確保你被徹底摧毀。

column1: Emperor \x80 be warned: the \x82 Empire has arrived to free the galaxy from the \x81 terror.
column2: \x80 皇帝,警告你:\x82 帝國已然降臨,要將銀河自 \x81 的恐怖中解放。

column1: The \x82 Empire will crush you utterly, \x80. Do not attempt to resist us.
column2: \x82 帝國將徹底粉碎你,\x80。別妄想抵抗我們。

column1: Do not attempt to stand in the way of \x82 mastery, foolish \x81. We will rule the galaxy; you are powerless to stop us!
column2: 別妄想阻擋 \x82 的霸業,愚蠢的 \x81。我們將統治銀河;你無力阻止!

column1: Fear me, \x80, for I speak for the mighty \x82 Empire: we will destroy you and all those who stand with you!
column2: 畏懼我吧,\x80,因為我代表強大的 \x82 帝國:我們將消滅你,以及所有與你為伍之人!

column1: You cannot succeed in your feeble attempts at mastery, \x80. The \x82 Empire will always prevail!
column2: 你那些軟弱的稱霸企圖不可能成功,\x80。\x82 帝國永遠勝利!

column1: The mighty \x82 Empire has a unified goal, Emperor \x80: to erase your empire from this galaxy!
column2: 強大的 \x82 帝國有一個共同目標,\x80 皇帝:將你的帝國自這個銀河抹除!

column1: Your destruction is inevitable, foolish \x81.  The \x82 Empire is destined to rule the galaxy!
column2: 你的毀滅無可避免,愚蠢的 \x81。\x82 帝國注定要統治銀河!

column1: Greetings, Emperor \x80! I am glad to finally meet you in person, it will make watching your destruction so much more pleasurable.
column2: 你好,\x80 皇帝!很高興終於能與你當面相見,這將使目睹你的毀滅更加愉悅。

column1: I hope that your race will last long enough to give my people a little sport, \x80. Like a cat with a mouse, we enjoy playing with our prey before destroying it.
column2: 我希望你的種族能撐得夠久,好讓我的人民玩樂一番,\x80。就像貓戲弄老鼠,我們喜歡在摧毀獵物前先把玩一番。

column1: Fear not, Emperor \x80. After your defeat, your people will be welcomed into the \x82 kingdom as the worthy slaves they are.
column2: 別害怕,\x80 皇帝。在你戰敗之後,你的人民將以其應得的奴隸身分,被 \x82 王國接納。

column1: Pray to whatever gods motivate you, \x80. We are coming for your ships, your planets, your people.
column2: 向任何能激勵你的神明祈禱吧,\x80。我們要來奪取你的船艦、你的行星、你的人民。

column1: I see that the competition has arrived. Let the games begin!
column2: 我看到對手已經到來。讓遊戲開始吧!

column1: So you are what passes for an emperor in the \x81 kingdom. You are truly much more pathetic than I ever imagined.
column2: 原來這就是 \x81 王國所謂的皇帝。你確實比我想像的還要可悲得多。

column1: The glorious \x82 Empire is here to dethrone you, \x80. But don't worry, Emperor \x83 will let you live on as a personal slave.
column2: 光榮的 \x82 帝國前來將你趕下王位,\x80。但別擔心,\x83 皇帝會讓你以私人奴隸的身分活下去。

column1: A fine empire you have built, Emperor \x80. It will be a worthy addition to the mighty \x82 kingdom!
column2: 你建立了一個不錯的帝國,\x80 皇帝。它將成為強大 \x82 王國一個值得的補充!
